zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth De Deane於大約1348年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾武德爾時，她的父親Sir Henry Deane40歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Deane24歲。她於大約1364年與William de Tyndale在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1396年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth De Deane于大约1348年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾武德爾时，她的父亲Sir Henry Deane40岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Deane24岁。她于大约1364年与William de Tyndale在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1396年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Deane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Deagánaigh ‘son of the deacon’ (see Deacon ). In Tipperary it can be from Gaelic Ó Déaghain ‘descendant of the deacon’. In some other cases the surname is of English origin (see Dean ).

variants.name: Digney
meanings: Scottish, Irish, and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two minor places in France called Digny (in Eure-et-Loir and Loiret).
Irish: from Gaelic Mac an Deaghánaigh ‘son of the deacon’ (see Deane ).

variants.name: Deacon
meanings: English: from Middle English deken, dicoun ‘deacon, a priest's assistant at church services’ (Old French diacne, Old English diacon, dēacon, both ultimately from Late Latin diaconus, from Greek diakonos ‘servant’). Since deacons were in holy orders they would not be permitted to marry (with allowance for those few already married when ordained), so the surname is probably in most cases a secular nickname rather than the name of a church official, perhaps denoting a deacon's servant.

Irish (Wexford): of English origin (see 1 and 2 above), taken to Ireland in the 17th century. When the Irish surname is not of English origin, it may be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Deocáin ‘descendant of Deocán’, a personal name of uncertain etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth De Deane was born about 1348, in Oundle, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Deane, was 40 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Deane, was 24. She married William de Tyndale about 1364, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1396, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth De Deane est née environ 1348, à Oundle, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Deane, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Deane, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William de Tyndale environ 1364, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1396, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth De Deane um 1348 in Oundle, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Deane 40 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Deane 24. Sie hat um 1364 in England, United Kingdom William de Tyndale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1396 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth De Deane è nata il circa 1348 nel Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Henry Deane, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Deane, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato William de Tyndale circa 1364, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1396, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth De Deaneが約1348年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアオウンドルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Deaneは40歳，母Lady Elizabeth Deaneは24歳であった。約1364年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam de Tyndaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1396年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth De Deane(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 우들일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Deane(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Deane(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1364년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William de Tyndale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth De Deane nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Deane, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Deane, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Tyndale aproximadamente 1364, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1396, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth De Deane родилась около 1348 г. в местности оундл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Deane было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Deane, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Tyndale около 1364 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1396 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth De Deane nació aproximadamente 1348, en Oundle, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Deane, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Deane, tenía 24 años. Se casó con William de Tyndale aproximadamente 1364, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1396, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
